title: Castaway on the Moon
posterAlt: Castaway on the Moon (2009) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Mr. Kim is jobless, lost in debt and has been dumped by his girlfriend. He decides to end it all by jumping into the Han River – only to find himself washed up on a small, mid-river island. He soon abandons thoughts of suicide or rescue and begins a new life as a castaway. His antics catch the attention of a young woman whose apartment overlooks the river. Her discovery changes both their lives.
synopsis: Released in 2009, Castaway on the Moon is a drama, comedy and romance film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a 14A certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
